steps.title: Find the slope of the given line
steps.content: Rewrite in slope-intercept form: $4y+8x=6 → y=-2x+3/2$. So the slope of the given line is $-2$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals, so the slope of the perpendicular line is $1/2$. The answer is .5.
